active_goal_objective: Implement the Law Firm OS foundation slice in /Users/jws/Documents/Codex/Law Firm OS by creating the real product scaffold and completing RP00-RP03 core foundations enough that product contracts, domain/authz/audit package skeletons, tests, Hermes validation hooks, Claude Code review packets, and weighted-ledger 준공검사 references all validate locally with the relevant npm validation commands.

agreed_conclusions.conclusion: Goal 1 covers RP00-RP03 foundation only, not all 54,355 subphases.
The goal is not complete until real scaffold, package skeletons, tests, Hermes hooks, Claude review packets, and weighted-ledger 준공검사 references validate locally.
Claude Code review is frequent during Goal 1, with at least 42 review checkpoints across C00-C03.
Hermes validates evidence and blocked claims but does not own product code or silently mutate product state.
Claude Code cross-validates architecture, security, domain correctness, missing tests, and go/no-go status but does not replace human approval.
준공검사 PASS means internal SaaS-grade product candidate, not market-validated SaaS.
Market SaaS-grade recognition requires customer pilots, migration rehearsal, feedback loops, incident/load/security rehearsal, onboarding/support operations, and post-release defect loops.

completion_guardrails: Do not mark Goal 1 complete from planning artifacts alone.
Do not mark Goal 1 complete without local validation command evidence.
Do not treat Hermes or Claude Code as final product authority.
Do not treat internal 준공검사 PASS as market SaaS validation.
Keep the goal active until the implementation objective is actually satisfied.
